reasons: Method calibration: pixel-measured ref body-tier6.png woman/mannequin = 648/726 = 0.893, matching the banked 0.894 — measurement method validated before judging.

V2 (PICK): measured ratio 655/726 = 0.902, within the ~0.90 pass band (target ~0.89). Four distinct views (front, 3/4, profile, back). Outfit identical to ref 2: double-stripe neckline (front and back), white side panels, letterless gold comet present in front AND 3/4, green/white/gold pleated skirt, white briefs visible under skirt in back view, white shoes with gold laces, low white socks. Strain reads: fabric taut with ab/lat definition showing through, stress at side and shoulder seams, no tears, full coverage. Muscle volume matches ref 2 on arm-vs-head, deltoid breadth, chest shelf, quad mass. Face/ponytail/gold scrunchie match face card. Grid cyc, mid-grey, no text, photoreal Iray, clean anatomy (2 hands per view, no phantoms).

V3: FAIL size/height — measured ratio 694/725 = 0.957, far above fail line; mannequin also partially cropped out of frame at right edge, degrading the scale reference. Strain read itself is strong; wardrobe correct.
